# Figure description: I.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/raw_graphics/Список_приложений/I.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is an **administrative/bibliographic data table** — specifically, a **list of graphic appendices** (список графических приложений) accompanying a geological report. It is a contents/inventory page cataloguing all maps, charts, and drawings included as appendices to the report volume.

---

## Coverage and Subject

The table covers **Volume IV (Том IV)** of the report and inventories **22 graphic appendices** (items 1–22). The geographic coverage spans multiple 1:200,000 map sheets of the **M-42 series** in northern Kazakhstan, specifically:

- **M-42-XV** (М-42-ХУ)
- **M-42-XIV** (М-42-ХIУ)
- **M-42-IX** (М-42-IХ)
- **M-42-VIII** (М-42-УШ)
- **M-42-VII** (М-42-УП)
- **M-42-II** (М-42-П)
- **M-42-III** (М-42-Ш)
- **M-42-XXXIII** (М-42-ХХХШ)
- **M-42-XXXIV, M-42-XXXV, M-42-IV, M-42-V** (combined sheet entries)

---

## Key Content

The table is structured with **7 columns**:

| Col | Heading | Content |
|-----|---------|---------|
| 1 | №№ п/п | Sequential number of the appendix |
| 2 | №№ чертежей | Drawing/chart number |
| 3 | Наименования графических приложений | Name/title of the graphic appendix |
| 4 | Масштаб | Scale |
| 5 | К-во листов | Number of sheets/leaves |
| 6 | Степень секретности | Classification/secrecy level |
| 7 | Вид бумаги | Type of paper/medium |

The 22 appendices catalogued include the following document types:

**Items 1:** Условные обозначения к геологическим картам — *Legend/key for geological maps* (no scale stated; 1 sheet; не секретно; карт.бумага/cartographic paper)

**Items 2–10:** Геологическая карта СССР — *Geological map of the USSR* at **1:200,000** scale, covering individual map sheets M-42-XV through M-42-XXXIV/XXXV/IV/V. Each is 1 sheet, not secret, printed on **ватман** (drafting/Whatman paper).

**Item 11:** Стратиграфические колонки — *Stratigraphic columns* (1 sheet; не секретно; карт.бумага)

**Item 12:** Условные обозначения к картам фактического материала — *Legend for actual-data/factual-material maps* (1 sheet; не секретно; карт.бумага)

**Items 13–21:** Карта фактического материала — *Map of actual (field) data* at **1:200,000**, covering the same series of map sheets (M-42-XV through M-42-XXXIV/XXXV/IV/V). Each is 1 sheet, not secret, printed on **калька** (tracing paper/vellum).

**Item 22:** Картограмма геологической изученности — *Cartogram of geological study/investigation coverage* at **1:1,000,000** scale (1 sheet; не секретно; карт.бумага)

All items across the entire list are marked **не секретно** (not secret/unclassified).
